rag_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
AGREE contracts are written within annex agree blocks in component type annexes
generic_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring identifiers are declared or removed
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
AGREE scalar types must be int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified names
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must have consistent types on both sides of operators
Guarantee and assume statements are only valid in component types
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee or assume statements in component implementations
Do not reference undefined identifiers in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
